name: cicd
description: GitHub Actions / Docker / GHCR pipeline troubleshooting and config — auto-routes by stack: backend Node (Prisma/Biome) or Django (gunicorn), plus frontend Vite. Deep self-hosted runner runbook (containerized myoung34 + systemd): registration-token chicken-and-egg, ACCESS_TOKEN/PAT migration, deprecated-binary & deleted-registration crashloops, stacked failures, silently-queued deploys. Also GHCR auth/TLS-handshake-timeout, reverse-proxy upstream poisoning, Django ALLOWED_HOSTS healthcheck-400. Triggers — CI/CD, GitHub Actions, GHCR auth, self-hosted runner, runner crashloop, registration token expired, runner version deprecated, compose run orphan, deploy queued, Django gunicorn.
